3175330.name: Simulator: Parking Lot Demo
3175330.description:
Simulator: Parking Lot Demo is a reduced version of the full game, with no option to expand the parking lot and fewer upgrade possibilities. Add the full version of Simulator: Parking Lot to your wishlist

Simulator: Parking Lot Demo is a parking management simulation game. Earn money by upgrading parking spots, expanding the number of spaces, and getting tips by cleaning your customers' cars.

Manage Your Parking Lot: 

Decide which spots to unlock first and how to upgrade them. Be careful with thieves, as they might steal your parking meters and break them. Only limited upgrades are available in the demo version.
3175330.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
